chapter_title: Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
text:
(a) The governing body may issue sign abatement revenue bonds.

(b) The governing body may use the proceeds from the bonds only to compensate the owner of a sign required to be removed under this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 395. Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
##### § 395.008 — Sign Abatement Revenue Bonds

(a) The governing body may issue sign abatement revenue bonds.

(b) The governing body may use the proceeds from the bonds only to compensate the owner of a sign required to be removed under this subchapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The governing body may issue sign abatement revenue bonds.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The governing body may use the proceeds from the bonds only to compensate the owner of a sign required to be removed under this subchapter.
